jobs.name: Trading Premarket Scan
jobs.prompt:
Run the daily premarket market scan for the Hermes-Trading project.

Steps:
1. cd to C:\Users\luned\Documents\Projects\Hermes-Trading
2. Run: python scripts/market_scan.py
3. Output the results (market snapshot, signals, journal entry summary)
4. If the script fails, report the error and exit with code 1

Report: market summary, any signals detected, and journal entries created.

jobs.name: Trading Intraday Scan
jobs.prompt:
Run the intraday signal scan for the Hermes-Trading project.

Steps:
1. cd to C:\Users\luned\Documents\Projects\Hermes-Trading
2. Run: python scripts/intraday_scan.py
3. Output the results (signals detected, any trades triggered)
4. If the script fails, report the error and exit with code 1

Report: any signals detected, trades triggered, and current exposure.

jobs.name: Trading Daily Recap
jobs.prompt:
Generate the daily trading recap for the Hermes-Trading project.

Steps:
1. cd to C:\Users\luned\Documents\Projects\Hermes-Trading
2. Query the trading database at C:\Users\luned\AppData\Local\hermes\profiles\trading\data\trading.db for today's trades and P&L
3. Summarize: total trades, winners/losers, net P&L, open positions, notable events
4. If no trades today, report "No trades executed today" with current portfolio status

Report: daily P&L summary, trade list, and portfolio status.

jobs.name: Trading Weekly Review
jobs.prompt:
Run the weekly performance report for the Hermes-Trading project.

Steps:
1. cd to C:\Users\luned\Documents\Projects\Hermes-Trading
2. Run: python scripts/weekly_report.py
3. Output the full report (performance stats, trade summary, open positions)
4. If the script fails, report the error and exit with code 1

Report: weekly performance summary, P&L, Sharpe ratio, max drawdown, open positions.

jobs.name: Trading Kanban Watcher
jobs.prompt:
Check the Hermes-Trading kanban board status and report any changes or issues.

Steps:
1. Run: hermes kanban list --board hermes-trading
2. Check for: tasks stuck in running > 1 hour, blocked tasks needing attention, new ready tasks
3. Report: summary of board state, any stuck/blocked tasks, recent completions
4. If everything is healthy, report "Board healthy — no action needed"

Keep the report concise. Only flag issues that need human attention.

jobs.name: Trading Active Board Watcher
jobs.prompt:
Check the Hermes-Trading active kanban board health and fix any issues.

Steps:
1. Run: hermes kanban list --board hermes-trading
2. Check for: crashed tasks (stale running), blocked tasks with resolved dependencies, tasks stuck > 2 hours
3. For any stuck/blocked tasks, add a kanban comment explaining the issue
4. Report: board health summary, any issues found and actions taken
5. If everything is healthy, report "Board healthy — no issues detected"

Keep the report concise. Focus on actionable issues.

jobs.name: Trading Market Watchdog
jobs.prompt: Run the trading system health check. This is a no-agent watchdog — just execute the script and report output.
